=== Refactor Application Results ===

=== [R1] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/toggleReturnTypeAnnotation.ts ---
// refactor: 4:22-4:23, 6:22-6:23, 8:10-8:11, 12:10-12:11, 16:10-16:11
import * as T from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = pipe(()) => T.succeed(42)

export const test2 = () => (true ? T.succeed(42) : false)

function sillyGenerics<A>(value: A) {
  return T.fail(value)
}

function removeAnnotation(): number {
  return 42
}

function removeAnnotationWithSpace(): number {
  return 42
}

// refactor: 4:22-4:23, 6:22-6:23, 8:10-8:11, 12:10-12:11, 16:10-16:11
import * as T from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = (): T.Effect<number, never, never> => T.succeed(42)

export const test2 = () => (true ? T.succeed(42) : false)

function sillyGenerics<A>(value: A) {
  return T.fail(value)
}

function removeAnnotation(): number {
  return 42
}

function removeAnnotationWithSpace(): number {
  return 42
}

export const test1 = () => T.succeed(42)

export const test2 = pipe(()) => (true ? T.succeed(42) : false)

function sillyGenerics<A>(value: A) {
  return T.fail(value)
}

function removeAnnotation(): number {
  return 42
}

  return 42

// refactor: 4:22-4:23, 6:22-6:23, 8:10-8:11, 12:10-12:11, 16:10-16:11
import * as T from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = () => T.succeed(42)

export const test2 = (): false | T.Effect<number, never, never> => (true ? T.succeed(42) : false)

function sillyGenerics<A>(value: A) {
  return T.fail(value)
}

function removeAnnotation(): number {
  return 42
}

function removeAnnotationWithSpace(): number {
  return 42
}

// refactor: 4:22-4:23, 6:22-6:23, 8:10-8:11, 12:10-12:11, 16:10-16:11
import * as T from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = () => T.succeed(42)

export const test2 = () => (true ? T.succeed(42) : false)

function pipe(s)illyGenerics<A>(value: A) {
  return T.fail(value)
}

function removeAnnotation(): number {
  return 42
}

function removeAnnotationWithSpace(): number {
  return 42
}

// refactor: 4:22-4:23, 6:22-6:23, 8:10-8:11, 12:10-12:11, 16:10-16:11
import * as T from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = () => T.succeed(42)

export const test2 = () => (true ? T.succeed(42) : false)

function sillyGenerics<A>(value: A): T.Effect<never, A, never> {
  return T.fail(value)
}

function removeAnnotation(): number {
  return 42
}

function removeAnnotationWithSpace(): number {
  return 42
}

import * as T from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = () => T.succeed(42)

export const test2 = () => (true ? T.succeed(42) : false)

const sillyGenerics = <A>(value: A) => T.fail(value);

function removeAnnotation(): number {
  return 42
}

function removeAnnotationWithSpace(): number {
  return 42
}

  return T.fail(value)

  return 42

// refactor: 4:22-4:23, 6:22-6:23, 8:10-8:11, 12:10-12:11, 16:10-16:11
import * as T from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = () => T.succeed(42)

export const test2 = () => (true ? T.succeed(42) : false)

function sillyGenerics<A>(value: A) {
  return T.fail(value)
}

const removeAnnotation = () => 42;

function removeAnnotationWithSpace(): number {
  return 42
}

import * as T from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = () => T.succeed(42)

export const test2 = () => (true ? T.succeed(42) : false)

function sillyGenerics<A>(value: A) {
  return T.fail(value)
}

function removeAnnotation(): number {
  return 42
}

function pipe(r)emoveAnnotationWithSpace(): number {
  return 42
}

export const test2 = () => (true ? T.succeed(42) : false)

function sillyGenerics<A>(value: A) {
  return T.fail(value)
}

function removeAnnotation(): number {
  return 42

=== [R5] Refactor 2: "Convert to arrow" ===

--- file:///.src/toggleReturnTypeAnnotation.ts ---
// refactor: 4:22-4:23, 6:22-6:23, 8:10-8:11, 12:10-12:11, 16:10-16:11
import * as T from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = () => T.succeed(42)

export const test2 = () => (true ? T.succeed(42) : false)

function sillyGenerics<A>(value: A) {
  return T.fail(value)
}

function removeAnnotation(): number {
  return 42
}

const removeAnnotationWithSpace = () => 42;
